selection_goal: Calibration-ready gold-set candidate pool spanning approval routes, source authority levels, implementation stages, and hard-case policy profiles.
selection_notes: Candidates are selected to balance auto_approve, sample_audit, and human_review cases.
At least one binding-law case, one secondary-reporting case, and one pending hard-case record are included.
The pool mixes high-strength guidance states with weaker or governance-only records to support calibration.

candidates.why_selected: Binding-law anchor with strong confidence and high policy strength; useful as the clearest high-authority baseline.
High-confidence official guidance case with dense evidence spans across all major domains.
Strong statewide guidance profile that helps calibrate upper-mid evidence cases below binding law.
High-strength approved guidance with broad domain coverage and fewer source documents than California, useful for density comparison.
Moderate-strength auto-approved guidance record that prevents the gold set from clustering only around top-strength states.
Compact approved case already present in the seed gold set; useful for continuity and evaluator regression checks.
Balanced sample-audit case with multi-domain support, including assessment and privacy.
Implementation-heavy guidance case with lighter evidence density; useful for testing teacher PD and governance coding.
Single-source but still substantial approved record that helps test robustness under thinner document packages.
Deep-research-informed case with partial domain coverage and strong teacher support; useful for calibration after escalation.
Low-strength emerging policy profile already in the seed gold set; valuable as a provisional statewide case.
Mid-confidence sample-audit record with assessment and privacy signals but lower overall strength.
Highest-strength reviewed case with operationalized implementation stage; ideal benchmark for a strong human-reviewed record.
Human-reviewed strong case with broad domain coverage and dense evidence support.
Human-reviewed case with the richest document package in the current corpus; useful for source-count calibration.
Human-reviewed case built from a single public release; useful for testing whether dense evidence can offset smaller source packages.
Human-reviewed comprehensive guidance hub with many linked documents; valuable for high-coverage verification.
Reviewed, mid-to-high strength guidance case that adds variation without collapsing into the strongest cluster.
Only secondary-reporting case in the current approved set; important boundary case for authority-sensitive calibration.
Pending low-confidence governance-only case; necessary negative control for avoiding inflated synthesis confidence.
